requirement_topic.en: ARME Grid Connection for BESS — 230/400 V 50 Hz System, IEC 62933, and ELECTRA Interconnection Requirements
requirement_topic.zh: ARME BESS并网——230/400 V 50 Hz系统、IEC 62933及ELECTRA互联要求
requirement_topic.zht: ARME BESS併網——230/400 V 50 Hz系統、IEC 62933及ELECTRA互聯要求

summary.en: ARME (Agência de Regulação Multissectorial da Economia) is Cape Verde's multi-sectoral economic regulator and governs grid-connected energy systems including BESS. ELECTRA is the national utility responsible for generation, transmission, and distribution across Cape Verde's island archipelago. All grid-connected BESS installations require ARME grid-connection approval and ELECTRA utility interconnection sign-off as separate mandatory gates. Cape Verde's grid operates at 230 V single-phase and 400 V three-phase at 50 Hz, following IEC/European standards rooted in the country's Portuguese technical legacy. BESS power conversion systems (PCS) must be designed, validated, and parameterised for 230/400 V at 50 Hz. IEC 62933-2-1 (Unit Parameters and Testing Methods) and IEC 62933-5-2 (Safety Requirements for electrochemical-based systems) are the expected international standards referenced in ARME grid-connection agreements and ELECTRA project specifications. Island microgrid conditions — including frequency deviations, variable renewable integration, and low inertia — impose additional stability and ride-through requirements beyond those applicable to large continental grids.
summary.zh: ARME（多部门经济监管机构）是佛得角多行业经济监管机构，管辖包括BESS在内的并网能源系统。ELECTRA是负责佛得角群岛发电、输电和配电的国家公用事业公司。所有并网BESS装置须分别取得ARME并网批准和ELECTRA公用事业互联确认两项强制审批。佛得角电网依据IEC/欧洲标准（源自葡萄牙技术遗产）运行，参数为单相230 V、三相400 V、50 Hz。BESS储能变流器（PCS）须针对230/400 V 50 Hz进行设计、验证和参数配置。IEC 62933-2-1（单元参数和测试方法）和IEC 62933-5-2（电化学系统安全要求）是ARME并网协议和ELECTRA项目规格中引用的预期国际标准。岛屿微电网条件——包括频率偏差、可变可再生能源并入及低惯量——对PCS提出了超越大陆电网的额外稳定性和穿越要求。
summary.zht: ARME（多部門經濟監管機構）是維德角多行業經濟監管機構，管轄包括BESS在內的併網能源系統。ELECTRA是負責維德角群島發電、輸電和配電的國家公用事業公司。所有併網BESS裝置須分別取得ARME併網批准和ELECTRA公用事業互聯確認兩項強制審批。維德角電網依據IEC/歐洲標準（源自葡萄牙技術遺產）運行，參數為單相230 V、三相400 V、50 Hz。BESS儲能變流器（PCS）須針對230/400 V 50 Hz進行設計、驗證和參數配置。IEC 62933-2-1（單元參數和測試方法）和IEC 62933-5-2（電化學系統安全要求）是ARME併網協議和ELECTRA項目規格中引用的預期國際標準。島嶼微電網條件——包括頻率偏差、可變可再生能源併入及低慣量——對PCS提出了超越大陸電網的額外穩定性和穿越要求。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62933-2-1:2017+AMD1:2021 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Unit Parameters and Testing Methods — General Specification (expected ARME/ELECTRA project-specification reference)
IEC 62933-5-2 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements — Electrochemical-based systems (expected project-specification reference)
ARME — Agência de Regulação Multissectorial da Economia (Cape Verde multi-sectoral regulator governing grid-connected BESS)
ELECTRA — Empresa de Electricidade e Água (Cape Verde national utility; utility interconnection approval required separately from ARME grid-connection approval)

summary.en: China's grid-connection requirements for BESS are governed by GB/T 36558-2023 (General Technical Requirements for Electrochemical Energy Storage Systems in Power Systems) and GB/T 34120-2017 (Technical Specification for Electrochemical Energy Storage System Connected to Distribution Network). PCS is assessed under NB/T 42090-2016 (Technical Code for Testing of Energy Storage Converters). China's grid operates at 50 Hz, 220 V single-phase and 380 V three-phase — this differs critically from Cape Verde's 230/400 V system. Although both grids share the 50 Hz frequency, the voltage difference (220 V vs 230 V single-phase; 380 V vs 400 V three-phase) means PCS voltage protection thresholds, ride-through settings, and transformer tap configurations set for the Chinese grid must be reconfigured, retested, and revalidated for Cape Verde's 230/400 V before grid-connection testing and commissioning. Chinese GB/T grid-connection certificates are not accepted by ARME or ELECTRA.
summary.zh: 中国BESS并网要求由GB/T 36558-2023（电力系统电化学储能系统通用技术条件）和GB/T 34120-2017（电化学储能系统接入配电网技术规范）管控。储能变流器（PCS）依据NB/T 42090-2016（储能变流器检测技术规程）进行评估。中国电网参数为50 Hz、单相220 V、三相380 V——与佛得角230/400 V系统存在关键差异。尽管两国电网共享50 Hz频率，但电压差异（单相220 V对230 V；三相380 V对400 V）意味着针对中国电网配置的PCS电压保护阈值、穿越参数和变压器分接头配置，须在并网测试和调试前重新针对佛得角230/400 V进行配置、重新测试和重新验证。中国GB/T并网证书不被ARME或ELECTRA接受。
summary.zht: 中國BESS併網要求由GB/T 36558-2023（電力系統電化學儲能系統通用技術條件）和GB/T 34120-2017（電化學儲能系統接入配電網技術規範）管控。儲能變流器（PCS）依據NB/T 42090-2016（儲能變流器檢測技術規程）進行評估。中國電網參數為50 Hz、單相220 V、三相380 V——與維德角230/400 V系統存在關鍵差異。儘管兩國電網共享50 Hz頻率，但電壓差異（單相220 V對230 V；三相380 V對400 V）意味著針對中國電網配置的PCS電壓保護閾值、穿越參數和變壓器分接頭配置，須在併網測試和調試前重新針對維德角230/400 V進行配置、重新測試和重新驗證。中國GB/T併網證書不被ARME或ELECTRA接受。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 36558-2023 — 电力系统电化学储能系统通用技术条件 (General Technical Requirements for Electrochemical Energy Storage Systems in Power Systems)
GB/T 34120-2017 — 电化学储能系统接入配电网技术规范 (Technical Specification for Electrochemical Energy Storage System Connected to Distribution Network)
NB/T 42090-2016 — 储能变流器检测技术规程 (Technical Code for Testing of Energy Storage Converters)

gap.en: Critical gap: (a) Voltage mismatch — Cape Verde uses 230/400 V whereas China uses 220/380 V; both are 50 Hz but the voltage levels differ. PCS voltage protection thresholds, ride-through settings, and transformer tap configurations must be reconfigured and retested for 230/400 V — this is not a trivial firmware update and may require hardware design review; (b) Chinese GB/T BESS grid-connection certificates and NEA approvals are not accepted by ARME or ELECTRA; (c) IEC 62933 series compliance is required where referenced in ARME connection agreements or ELECTRA project specifications; (d) Island microgrid derating — Cape Verde's island grids have low inertia and high renewable penetration targets; BESS PCS must be validated for frequency stability support, black-start capability, and microgrid-forming or grid-following operation modes as required by ELECTRA; (e) SCADA and communication protocols — confirm IEC 61850 or ELECTRA-specified protocol requirements for BESS monitoring and dispatch.
gap.zh: 关键差距：（a）电压不匹配——佛得角使用230/400 V，中国使用220/380 V；两者均为50 Hz，但电压等级不同。PCS电压保护阈值、穿越参数和变压器分接头配置须针对230/400 V重新配置并重新测试——这不是简单的固件更新，可能需要硬件设计审查；（b）中国GB/T BESS并网证书和NEA审批不被ARME或ELECTRA接受；（c）ARME并网协议或ELECTRA项目规格中引用IEC 62933系列标准合规要求；（d）岛屿微电网降额——佛得角岛屿电网惯量低、可再生能源渗透率目标高；BESS PCS须根据ELECTRA要求验证频率稳定支撑、黑启动能力及微电网构网或跟网运行模式；（e）SCADA和通信协议——确认BESS监控和调度的IEC 61850或ELECTRA规定协议要求。
gap.zht: 關鍵差距：（a）電壓不匹配——維德角使用230/400 V，中國使用220/380 V；兩者均為50 Hz，但電壓等級不同。PCS電壓保護閾值、穿越參數和變壓器分接頭配置須針對230/400 V重新配置並重新測試——這不是簡單的韌體更新，可能需要硬件設計審查；（b）中國GB/T BESS併網證書和NEA審批不被ARME或ELECTRA接受；（c）ARME併網協議或ELECTRA項目規格中引用IEC 62933系列標準合規要求；（d）島嶼微電網降額——維德角島嶼電網慣量低、可再生能源滲透率目標高；BESS PCS須根據ELECTRA要求驗證頻率穩定支撐、黑啟動能力及微電網構網或跟網運行模式；（e）SCADA和通訊協議——確認BESS監控和調度的IEC 61850或ELECTRA規定協議要求。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — ARME grid-connection approval and ELECTRA utility interconnection sign-off are both required for all grid-connected BESS in Cape Verde; IEC 62933 compliance expected where referenced in connection agreements
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB/T 36558 and NEA grid-operator approval procedures are mandatory for grid-connected BESS in China; not accepted as equivalent by ARME or ELECTRA

source.publisher: ARME — Agência de Regulação Multissectorial da Economia (Cape Verde)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese GB/T BESS grid-connection compliance does not satisfy ARME or ELECTRA requirements for Cape Verde. A critical and often overlooked voltage gap exists: Cape Verde operates at 230/400 V whereas China uses 220/380 V — both 50 Hz but voltage levels differ, requiring hardware-level PCS reconfiguration and revalidation, not just a firmware change. Engage ARME and ELECTRA at the earliest project stage to determine connection agreement technical requirements, applicable IEC 62933 evidence, island microgrid operating modes, and SCADA protocol specifications before equipment procurement is finalised.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国GB/T BESS并网合规不满足佛得角ARME或ELECTRA要求。存在一个关键且常被忽视的电压差距：佛得角运行于230/400 V，中国为220/380 V——均为50 Hz但电压等级不同，须对PCS进行硬件级重新配置和重新验证，而非仅更新固件。应在设备采购最终确定前的项目最早阶段与ARME和ELECTRA接触，确定并网协议技术要求、适用IEC 62933证据、岛屿微电网运行模式及SCADA协议规格。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國GB/T BESS併網合規不滿足維德角ARME或ELECTRA要求。存在一個關鍵且常被忽視的電壓差距：維德角運行於230/400 V，中國為220/380 V——均為50 Hz但電壓等級不同，須對PCS進行硬件級重新配置和重新驗證，而非僅更新韌體。應在設備採購最終確定前的項目最早階段與ARME和ELECTRA接觸，確定併網協議技術要求、適用IEC 62933證據、島嶼微電網運行模式及SCADA協議規格。

requirement_topic.en: Island Microgrid Stability, Derating, and Renewable Integration — ELECTRA Technical Requirements for BESS
requirement_topic.zh: 岛屿微电网稳定性、降额及可再生能源并入——ELECTRA对BESS的技术要求
requirement_topic.zht: 島嶼微電網穩定性、降額及可再生能源併入——ELECTRA對BESS的技術要求

summary.en: Cape Verde operates nine inhabited islands as distinct island microgrids with no interconnection between islands. ELECTRA targets over 50% renewable energy penetration per island by the late 2020s under the national Sustainable Energy for All (SE4All) and PEDS (Plano Estratégico para o Desenvolvimento Sustentável) frameworks. Island microgrid BESS must support frequency regulation, voltage support, spinning reserve replacement, and black-start capability. Low system inertia on small island grids means that BESS response time and droop characteristics must be validated specifically for Cape Verde's island grid conditions. Tropical coastal environment — including sustained high humidity (>85% RH), salt mist exposure, and ambient temperatures of 20–32°C year-round — imposes continuous environmental stress on BESS enclosures, battery thermal management systems, and PCS electronics. Equipment rated and tested only to Chinese GB standards under standard laboratory conditions may not meet ELECTRA's operational reliability expectations in Cape Verde's island microgrid environment.
summary.zh: 佛得角九个有人居住的岛屿作为独立岛屿微电网运行，岛屿之间无互联。佛得角依据国家《人人享有可持续能源》（SE4All）和PEDS（可持续发展战略规划）框架，目标是2020年代末每岛可再生能源渗透率超过50%。岛屿微电网BESS须支持频率调节、电压支撑、旋转备用替代和黑启动能力。小岛电网系统惯量低，意味着BESS响应时间和下垂特性须专门针对佛得角岛屿电网条件进行验证。热带沿海环境——包括持续高湿度（>85% RH）、盐雾侵蚀及全年20–32°C环境温度——对BESS机柜、电池热管理系统和PCS电子元器件持续施加环境压力。仅按中国GB标准在标准实验室条件下额定和测试的设备，可能无法满足ELECTRA对佛得角岛屿微电网环境运行可靠性的期望。
summary.zht: 維德角九個有人居住的島嶼作為獨立島嶼微電網運行，島嶼之間無互聯。維德角依據國家《人人享有可持續能源》（SE4All）和PEDS（可持續發展戰略規劃）框架，目標是2020年代末每島可再生能源滲透率超過50%。島嶼微電網BESS須支持頻率調節、電壓支撐、旋轉備用替代和黑啟動能力。小島電網系統慣量低，意味著BESS響應時間和下垂特性須專門針對維德角島嶼電網條件進行驗證。熱帶沿海環境——包括持續高濕度（>85% RH）、鹽霧侵蝕及全年20–32°C環境溫度——對BESS機櫃、電池熱管理系統和PCS電子元器件持續施加環境壓力。僅按中國GB標準在標準實驗室條件下額定和測試的設備，可能無法滿足ELECTRA對維德角島嶼微電網環境運行可靠性的期望。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62933-2-2 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Unit Parameters and Testing Methods for Grid-connected systems (island microgrid applicability)
IEC 60068-2-52 — Environmental Testing — Salt Mist (cyclic) — applicable to BESS enclosures and PCS in coastal Cape Verde installations
ELECTRA — Empresa de Electricidade e Água (Cape Verde national utility; sets island microgrid technical acceptance requirements for BESS)
Cape Verde PEDS — Plano Estratégico para o Desenvolvimento Sustentável (national sustainable development plan; >50% renewable target drives BESS procurement)

summary.en: Chinese BESS standards do not include island microgrid-specific testing or tropical coastal salt-mist environmental qualification as standard requirements. GB/T 36276-2023 covers module and cluster performance under Chinese standard laboratory ambient conditions (typically 25°C, standard humidity). GB/T 36558-2023 covers grid-connection technical requirements for China's large continental synchronous grid, not for small isolated island microgrids with low inertia and high renewable penetration. Environmental testing for coastal deployments — including IEC 60068-2-52 salt mist or equivalent — is not mandated under Chinese GB standards for BESS. Exporters must assess whether Chinese-standard equipment ratings remain valid under Cape Verde's sustained 20–32°C tropical ambient, >85% relative humidity, and coastal salt-mist exposure, and must supply evidence of compliance with ELECTRA's island-specific operational requirements.
summary.zh: 中国BESS标准不包含岛屿微电网专项测试或热带沿海盐雾环境鉴定作为标准要求。GB/T 36276-2023在中国标准实验室环境条件（通常为25°C、标准湿度）下涵盖模组和电池簇性能。GB/T 36558-2023涵盖适用于中国大型大陆同步电网的并网技术要求，不适用于惯量低、可再生能源渗透率高的小型孤立岛屿微电网。沿海部署的环境测试——包括IEC 60068-2-52盐雾测试或等效测试——未被中国GB标准强制要求用于BESS。出口商须评估中国标准设备额定参数在佛得角持续20–32°C热带环境、>85%相对湿度和沿海盐雾暴露下是否仍然有效，并须提供符合ELECTRA岛屿专属运行要求的证据。
summary.zht: 中國BESS標準不包含島嶼微電網專項測試或熱帶沿海鹽霧環境鑒定作為標準要求。GB/T 36276-2023在中國標準實驗室環境條件（通常為25°C、標準濕度）下涵蓋模組和電池簇性能。GB/T 36558-2023涵蓋適用於中國大型大陸同步電網的併網技術要求，不適用於慣量低、可再生能源滲透率高的小型孤立島嶼微電網。沿海部署的環境測試——包括IEC 60068-2-52鹽霧測試或等效測試——未被中國GB標準強制要求用於BESS。出口商須評估中國標準設備額定參數在維德角持續20–32°C熱帶環境、>85%相對濕度和沿海鹽霧暴露下是否仍然有效，並須提供符合ELECTRA島嶼專屬運行要求的證據。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 36276-2023 — 电力储能用锂离子电池 (Lithium-Ion Batteries for Electrical Energy Storage; voluntary, not island microgrid or tropical-environment specific)
GB/T 36558-2023 — 电力系统电化学储能系统通用技术条件 (General Technical Requirements for EES in Power Systems; continental grid scope, not island microgrid specific)

gap.en: Gap: Chinese GB BESS standards do not address island microgrid operating conditions, low-inertia frequency regulation, or tropical coastal environmental stress. Key requirements that Chinese standard compliance does not cover: (a) island microgrid frequency stability and droop control validation specific to Cape Verde's grid inertia profile; (b) salt-mist environmental qualification per IEC 60068-2-52 or ELECTRA-accepted equivalent — essential for all BESS installed on Cape Verde's Atlantic island locations; (c) thermal derating evidence for sustained operation at 20–32°C ambient with >85% RH — Chinese GB test conditions do not replicate Cape Verde's tropical coastal climate; (d) black-start and grid-forming capability validation if required by ELECTRA for critical island grid resilience; (e) ELECTRA project specifications may require IEC 62933-2-2 grid-connected system performance evidence that goes beyond what Chinese GB/T standards provide.
gap.zh: 差距：中国GB BESS标准不涉及岛屿微电网运行条件、低惯量频率调节或热带沿海环境压力。中国标准合规未涵盖的关键要求：（a）专门针对佛得角电网惯量特性的岛屿微电网频率稳定性和下垂控制验证；（b）依据IEC 60068-2-52或ELECTRA认可等效标准的盐雾环境鉴定——对所有安装于佛得角大西洋岛屿地点的BESS至关重要；（c）在20–32°C环境、>85%相对湿度下持续运行的热降额证据——中国GB测试条件无法复现佛得角热带沿海气候；（d）若ELECTRA为关键岛屿电网韧性要求，须进行黑启动和构网能力验证；（e）ELECTRA项目规格可能要求IEC 62933-2-2并网系统性能证据，超出中国GB/T标准所提供的范围。
gap.zht: 差距：中國GB BESS標準不涉及島嶼微電網運行條件、低慣量頻率調節或熱帶沿海環境壓力。中國標準合規未涵蓋的關鍵要求：（a）專門針對維德角電網慣量特性的島嶼微電網頻率穩定性和下垂控制驗證；（b）依據IEC 60068-2-52或ELECTRA認可等效標準的鹽霧環境鑒定——對所有安裝於維德角大西洋島嶼地點的BESS至關重要；（c）在20–32°C環境、>85%相對濕度下持續運行的熱降額證據——中國GB測試條件無法複現維德角熱帶沿海氣候；（d）若ELECTRA為關鍵島嶼電網韌性要求，須進行黑啟動和構網能力驗證；（e）ELECTRA項目規格可能要求IEC 62933-2-2併網系統性能證據，超出中國GB/T標準所提供的範圍。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — ELECTRA technical acceptance required for all island microgrid BESS; salt-mist and tropical environmental qualification expected; specific requirements defined at project level
mandatory_status.cn: Not applicable — Chinese GB standards do not address island microgrid operating conditions or Cape Verde's tropical coastal environment; no direct equivalent

source.publisher: ELECTRA — Empresa de Electricidade e Água (Cape Verde national utility)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese GB BESS standards do not cover island microgrid operating conditions, low-inertia frequency stability, or Cape Verde's tropical coastal salt-mist environment. BESS supplied for Cape Verde island installations must demonstrate IEC 62933 system performance, salt-mist environmental qualification, thermal derating for tropical ambient conditions, and ELECTRA-specified microgrid operating modes. Engage ELECTRA at the earliest project stage to obtain island-specific technical requirements before equipment design is finalised.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国GB BESS标准不涵盖岛屿微电网运行条件、低惯量频率稳定性或佛得角热带沿海盐雾环境。供应至佛得角岛屿装置的BESS须证明IEC 62933系统性能、盐雾环境鉴定、热带环境热降额以及ELECTRA规定的微电网运行模式。应在设备设计最终确定前的项目最早阶段与ELECTRA接触，获取岛屿专属技术要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國GB BESS標準不涵蓋島嶼微電網運行條件、低慣量頻率穩定性或維德角熱帶沿海鹽霧環境。供應至維德角島嶼裝置的BESS須證明IEC 62933系統性能、鹽霧環境鑒定、熱帶環境熱降額以及ELECTRA規定的微電網運行模式。應在設備設計最終確定前的項目最早階段與ELECTRA接觸，獲取島嶼專屬技術要求。
